title: Pig Tagger
description: Shows the player's tier (from cistiers.net) above his head
body:
This mod is designed to improve the visibility of participants in PvP battles on the server. It adds a visual indicator in the form of a special rank, which is displayed directly above the head of each player who has successfully passed the qualification test on the [cistiers.net](https://cistiers.net/)
# Preview
